details.address: 101 W Morehead St Ste A, Charlotte, NC 28202

raw_data.address: 101 W Morehead St ste A, Charlotte, NC 28202
raw_data.name: Green Cafe
raw_data.subtypes: Coffee shop, Juice shop, Sandwich shop

reviews_data.review_text: I recently stopped by Green Cafe and tried their chicken pesto — it was absolutely fantastic. The food was fresh, flavorful, and so good that I wanted to keep coming back. Their organic coffee also had a rich, natural taste that I really enjoyed. It’s a wonderful spot to relax and definitely worth visiting!
Strong coffee, good pastries. Nice atmosphere, the manager is really friendly

Very cute place
Good prices
Manager is super friendly
Best chai in the city! Absolutely wonderful owner too.
I like their Green Café Chicken Pesto, and the people who work in the café are very welcoming !

Stumbled upon this place after a workout and it was PHENOMENAL! The bacon egg and cheese bagel with the breakfast sauce is perfect, the chicken pesto has the most wonderful balance of ingredients, and Dave the owner let us try the Chai tea which I thoroughly enjoyed! We will definitely be back!
Very nice staff and great coffee/food

Green Cafe has been my go to place to grab a coffee and have a meal. I loved the bright and warm atmosphere, friendly service, and delicious food. Dave and Abeba are an amazing host with a delightful smile and an outstanding customer service.
The owner Dave is very accommodating. The pastries are fresh and delicious. I got a dirty chai latte and the chai was spicy and fragrant. Highly recommend!
Wonderful customer service,with welcoming smile,one of the best delicious sandwich that I ever had for a while,I am definitely come back with friends to get my favorite espresso shot,thank yall.
I tried the chai latte and Chicken pesto. The chai latte was rich and perfectly spiced. The chicken pesto on organic artisan ciabatta bread was delicious. Highly recommend!

So excited this spot is open! I had a pleasure of talking to the owner and actually got to try the coffee when they were still getting ready. Everyone is so friendly and nice! We went today for the soft opening and coffee and food was delicious! I am excited to have a place so close to my apartment.

You definitely have to go and support this new local spot, great service, coffee and food!
The service is Very professional , the food is so amazing and the cafe is uptown. I really love it , and I advise you to go and test it. Blessings
